{{Quote|You should be honored. You will be the first Jedi in a thousand years to feel the effects of the Harvester. Your lifeforce will be absorbed, along with everything else in this forest, and in the end, I will use that power to destroy the Republic that you fought so hard to defend.|[[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|<ref name="Game" />}}
A '''battle''' on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]] was initiated by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], shortly after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]].

==Prelude==
Shortly after the Republic loss at [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Bera Kazan]] were held prisoner by the CIS and taken to the [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] moon of [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]]. There [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] ordered [[Cydon Prax]] to activate the [[Force Harvester]], which would destroy the forests of the planet, as well as kill anyone in its vicinity.

==The battle==
Anakin and Bera managed to escape on stolen [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|STAPs]] as well as free other prisoners (primarily [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]]). Bera knew some of the Wookiees in the nearby villages, and so they borrowed a pair of [[Maru/Legends|maru]] and that night, infiltrated a Separatist communications center. Using a stolen [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tank]], the two got farther into the base. Anakin then contacted the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and escaped from the base.

The next day, Anakin and Bera, along with a group of Wookiee soldiers waited for the Republic to arrive. The Confederacy ruthlessly attacked the [[Wookiee village (Alaris Prime)|village]], taking out some of the homes. Anakin, Bera, and the Wookiee soldiers managed to hold off the droid forces long enough for the Republic Army to arrive by setting explosive traps that would collapse loosened rocks on some of the enemy Homing Spider Droids and triggering them, which drastically slowed down the droid assault.

A decent force of clone troopers and tanks soon arrived in an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] and aided in the battle, fending off many droids and destroying most of the force. Kenobi and Skywalker then finished off the remaining Separatists and took out a large assault vehicle called the [[Harbinger (landing ship)|''Harbinger'']], prompting the Separatists to retreat.
